title: collomia grandiflora subsp. diffusa
intro: Collomia grandiflora subsp. diffusa, also known as the spreading collomia, is a perennial plant species native to western North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Collomia grandiflora subsp. diffusa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from cold and flu symptoms. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, although its effects and usage should be further studied and confirmed.
